headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Labcorp (LH) After Strong Healthcare Sector Coverage And DCF Upside?
summary: If you are wondering whether Labcorp Holdings is priced attractively right now, starting with a clear look at its valuation can help you decide how it fits into your portfolio. The stock recently closed at US$289.12, with reported returns of 2.3% over 7 days, 6.5% over 30 days, 14.9% year to date, 16.4% over 1 year, 45.9% over 3 years, and 48.5% over 5 years.
